lens.description: PLACEHOLDER / STUB. A Lens is a saved query — a specification, not code — evaluated live to derive membership; conceptually { source, filter, sort } (DESIGN: Lens, 10453000). This stub exists only so app.zurfur.graph.collection#dynamic can structurally reference a Lens. The concrete, normative Lens schema is deferred to a future Lens-lexicon DD. The fields below are NON-NORMATIVE, optional placeholders — do not treat them as the final shape.

source.description: PLACEHOLDER. The candidate set the Lens draws from (e.g. all Posts, a creator's Posts, another Collection/Lens). Final encoding TBD by the Lens DD.

filter.description: PLACEHOLDER. The predicates that decide membership (tags, kind, rating, status, dates). Final encoding TBD by the Lens DD.

sort.description: PLACEHOLDER. The ordering rule (newest, oldest, weighted). Final encoding TBD by the Lens DD.
